beforeSnapshot.name: getWeather

200.description: Weather data with current conditions and hourly forecast

schema.summary: Get weather data for a position

beforeSnapshot.purpose: Fetch weather data for a lat/lon position, mapping Result to HTTP response.

afterSnapshot.name: getWeather

200.description: Weather data with current conditions, hourly forecast, and sea safety status

schema.summary: Get weather data for a position with sea safety indicator

afterSnapshot.purpose: Fetch weather data for a lat/lon position, mapping Result to HTTP response.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Adding seaStatus (current + hourly) to the weather API response so the frontend can render the global safety indicator.
implementation: After fetching weather data, call computeSeaStatus on both the current snapshot and each hourly entry. Attach the results as seaStatus and hourlySeaStatus fields on the response object.
